name: Nomni (formerly Liven)
one_liner: Dining-rewards app (rebranded from Liven to Nomni in 2025) — pay in-app at partner restaurants to earn redeemable rewards.
benefit: Earn 5–30% back as Nomni Rewards (formerly LivenCash) at partner restaurants; rewards are store credit redeemable at any partner venue, not cash to your bank — applied automatically when you pay via the app.
signup_bonus: ~$5–10 reward credit for new members who sign up via a referral (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral code from OzBargain's Liven/Nomni referral thread
Download the Liven/Nomni app (iOS or Android) and create an account using the referral code
Add a payment method and browse nearby partner restaurants
Pay via the app at a participating restaurant to earn rewards automatically

risks: Partner restaurant coverage is strongest in major cities (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth)
Rewards are store credit redeemable only at partner venues — not withdrawable cash
Rebranded to Nomni; some venues drop in/out — confirm participation before relying on it
est_value: ~$5–10 signup credit + 5–30% back on dining out at partner venues
